title: Dummy Architecture Showcase Clean
excerpt: A clean dummy Wagtail article for testing architecture blocks with compact diagrams and code snippets.

body.value:
This dummy article is designed to render cleanly in your current Wagtail layout. The diagrams are intentionally compact so they do not explode the page width or become unreadable.

It includes Mermaid, PlantUML, code snippets, rich text, and callouts.

value.title: Why this version is better
value.text: The previous version used large sequence and deployment diagrams with too much text. This version keeps node names short and uses simpler structures that fit the available width.

value.caption: Request flow
value.diagram:
flowchart TD
    Browser --> Wagtail
    Wagtail --> Page
    Page --> HTML

value.caption: Publish flow
value.diagram:
flowchart LR
    Draft --> Review
    Review --> Publish
    Publish --> Live

value.caption: Simple model
value.diagram:
classDiagram
    class BlogIndexPage
    class BlogPostPage
    class Category
    BlogIndexPage --> BlogPostPage
    BlogPostPage --> Category

value.caption: Simple components
value.source:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor User
rectangle Browser
rectangle Wagtail
rectangle Page
User --> Browser
Browser --> Wagtail
Wagtail --> Page
@enduml

value.caption: Seed flow
value.source:
@startuml
left to right direction
rectangle Seeder
rectangle JSON
rectangle Wagtail
rectangle DB
Seeder --> JSON
Seeder --> Wagtail
Wagtail --> DB
@enduml

value.caption: Article structure
value.source:
@startuml
class BlogPostPage
class Category
class Tag
BlogPostPage --> Category
BlogPostPage --> Tag
@enduml

value.caption: Python example

value.title: Figure block
value.text: I still did not include the figure block here because it usually requires an existing Wagtail image object reference, not just plain JSON text.

body.value: This version should render much more neatly in your current frontend.
